name: promptward
description: LLM gateway that detects prompt injection and data exfiltration, validates structured output, and tracks cost -- with an eval harness that proves the detection rate.

scripts.check: biome format . && pnpm -r --if-present typecheck && pnpm core:build && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --locked -- -D warnings && cargo test -p tripwire-core --locked && pnpm eval
